description_short: Give your fur baby some tail-wagging comfort. Our Orthopedic Dog Bed provides superior joint & muscle support for aging pets, dogs with arthritis, or those recovering from injuries.

construction_layers.name: HD Foam Core
construction_layers.notes: Supportive feel, spreads weight evenly to reduce joint pressure.

cover_fabric.composition: Knitted velour fabric with velvet finish (scratch resistant)
cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash delicate cycle, cold water, msupport detergent. No bleach. Air dry.

faq_specs.question: How does this dog bed help with joint pain and muscle support?
faq_specs.answer: The orthopedic dog bed uses high-density foam that evenly distributes weight, helping reduce pressure on joints and supporting muscles for more restful sleep.

faq_specs.question: Is the SleepyCat orthopedic dog bed suitable for senior dogs?
faq_specs.answer: Absolutely. Designed to provide enhanced support, especially comfortable for senior dogs or those with mobility concerns.

notes_observed: vs Original Dog Bed: 4" HD foam (solid) instead of 2" shredded foam. Targets senior/joint-issue dogs. Higher weight capacity (up to 45kg vs 25kg).
